Encounter_Summary: Cold spots detected in the ballroom accompanied by a floating figure in a Victorian dress.
Objects flying across the kitchen. Heavy footsteps heard when the house was completely empty.
A dark silhouette seen lingering at the end of the hallway during twilight hours.
Extreme negative energy reported. Sudden drop in temperature down to freezing levels.
Whispers heard in Room 217. A phantom businessman seen walking through the walls.
Sounds of construction and hammering heard at midnight in the sealed corridors.
Loud thumping noises coming from the basement area. Apparition spotted near the old furnace.
A lighthouse keeper's spirit seen walking the catwalk holding a dim lantern.
Phantom sounds of drums and marching soldiers heard near the battlefield tree line.
Fleeting shadows moving rapidly across the underground Shanghai tunnels.
